summary.title: Profile
summary.content:
Engineering leader with 19+ years of experience across SaaS, startups, and product environments. Scaled backend and platform systems at Riverside while leading a 27-person engineering group across 4 teams.

Background spans platform strategy, monetization systems, event-driven architecture, and hands-on AI product development during a recent sabbatical.

items.description:
• Built AI-native products across local transcription, document-intelligence workflows, and applied retrieval systems.

  • Worked hands-on with on-device models, context caching, agent orchestration, and AI workflow design.

  • Advised a stealth startup founder in a fractional CTO-style engagement, defining scope, tech stack, database architecture, roadmap, and an initial product skeleton and POC.

roles.position: Senior Engineering Manager (Internal Title: Group Lead)
roles.description:
• Directed a 27-person engineering group across 4 teams, working through team leads and managers across Platform, Publishing, Business, and Growth.

  • Served as final technical sign-off for senior backend and system design interviews across multiple orgs.

  • Guided the backend evolution from a monolith to event-driven architecture with Kafka and Protobuf, improving reliability, observability, and team autonomy.

  • Acted as an architectural reviewer across my group and partner teams, driving design reviews, technical sign-off, and cross-team coordination for complex features and platform changes.

• Built Riverside's first formal full-stack team, growing the team to 6.

  • Owned core platform services and the main user dashboard across billing, plans, entitlements, and payment flows.

  • Split critical services from the monolith and introduced end-to-end observability across backend services and Kafka flows, contributing to a 33% reduction in overall system latency.

  • Designed and shipped the first version of an event-driven token ledger that supported AI feature billing and enabled usage-based monetization.

• Joined Riverside as one of 6 engineers and shipped core backend features that supported the product's early growth.

  • Took ownership of billing, payments, plans, features, and entitlements, evolving an early Stripe-and-webhooks setup into a more robust internal monetization model.

items.description:
• Co-founded and led Streamix, a cloud platform for professional live video production built around WebRTC workflows.
  • Owned product strategy and technical direction across streaming systems, backend services, and cross-platform product development.

items.name: Verba
items.description: Built a local-first speech-to-text app for macOS, including the product flow, licensing model, and on-device transcription pipeline. Combined transcription with local language-model cleanup so users can dictate without sending audio to the cloud.

items.name: Informia
items.description: Built an AI-assisted workflow for property registry processes in Argentina, covering document extraction, review, and browser-assisted submission. Extracts key fields from scanned deeds, shows supporting evidence, and uses context caching to reduce operating cost.

items.name: FallosES
items.description: Built a legal research assistant for Spain with a WhatsApp interface, lightweight web app, and grounded search over official sources. Maintains context and returns cited answers with concise summaries.
